title: ononis viscosa subsp. crotalarioides
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. crotalarioides, also known as a type of stickleback or bladder clover, is a plant species within the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including aiding digestion and reducing fever, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Ononis viscosa subsp. crotalarioides can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any plant-based medicine.
